column1: The average person in Wales speak Welsh.
For a long time, education in Wales was given only in English.
at one point, the Welsh language nearly died out.
The Welsh Language Society sometimes hurt people during its actions.
Traffic police are required to speak both English and Welsh.
Many common activities in Wales today are carried out in English.
People who leave Wales to find work still make good use of Welish.
People have to speak english in all EU meetings.
